data.name: HangfireConnectionRequired
data.value: Hangfire requires a database connection. Please configure either 'HangfireConnection' or 'DefaultConnection' in appsettings.json

data.name: ConnectionStringNotFound
data.value: ConnectionString or DefaultConnection not found in configuration

data.name: ConnectionStringNotFoundPostgres
data.value: ConnectionString or DefaultConnection not found in configuration. Please configure PostgreSQL connection string.
